name: Slow Cooked Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Season whole uncut slabs of pork ribs with salt and pepper.
2. Cook slowly in a smoker using low heat (220°F) for two hours.
3. For the next three hours, baste ribs with a mix of equal parts tomato-based barbecue sauce, white vinegar, and sparkling water every half hour.
4. For the final hour of cooking, change the baste to a mix of equal parts barbecue sauce and sparkling water.
5. The ribs will have cooked a total of six hours. Serve with plenty of sauce on the side.
